name: Birch Juice Moisturizing Sunscreen
notes: Hydrating sunscreen demo record. Some users report eye sting with sunscreens generally.

notes: Hydrating essence demo record. Avoid if personally sensitive to snail mucin.

name: Ceramide Ato Concentrate Cream
notes: Rich cream demo record; may feel heavy for oily skin.

name: Dive-In Low Molecular Hyaluronic Acid Serum
Dark Spot Correcting Glow Serum
notes: Brightening serum demo record with niacinamide.

name: AHA BHA PHA 30 Days Miracle Toner
notes: Exfoliating toner demo record; use carefully if sensitive.

name: Zero Pore Pad
notes: Toner pad demo record; exfoliating products can irritate sensitive skin.

notes: Oil cleanser demo record; can be unsuitable for some acne-prone users.

notes: Gel cleanser demo record with tea tree related ingredient flag.

notes: Ferment serum demo record; patch test if reactive.

name: Black Rice Hyaluronic Toner Fragrance Free

notes: Vitamin C style brightening demo record; can irritate some sensitive users.

name: Chestnut BHA 2 Clear Liquid
notes: BHA exfoliant demo record; avoid overuse.

name: Pure Cleansing Oil
notes: Oil cleanser demo record with fragrance/essential oil caution.

name: The Retinol 0.1 Cream
notes: Retinol demo record; avoid if pregnant unless medically cleared.

name: Reedle Shot 100
